item.description:
## Highlights - Native macOS Mach-O inspector and editor with drag-and-drop workspace, slice/load-command inspection, dependency editing, retag tooling, preferences, localization, theming, and recent files persisted via GRDB. - Bundled `machoe-cli` with install/uninstall controls in Preferences for inspecting slices, dylibs, rpaths, and retag operations from Terminal. - Sparkle-based automatic updates, notarized DMG packaging, release screenshots in README, and release automation scripts for DMG, appcast, and GitHub publishing.
## Verification - `xcodebuild test -project MachOKnife.xcodeproj -scheme MachOKnife -destination 'platform=macOS,arch=x86_64' -only-testing:MachOKnifeTests/UpdateManagerTests -only-testing:MachOKnifeTests/UpdatesPreferencesViewModelTests -only-testing:MachOKnifeTests/RepositoryLayoutTests -only-testing:MachOKnifeTests/ProjectConfigurationTests` - `bash Scripts/build_dmg.sh` - `bash Scripts/generate_appcast.sh --archive build/dmg/MachOKnife_V_1.0.dmg --notes 'MachOKnife 1.0 initial release.'`
